articles.title: Katy Perry and Justin Trudeau Poke Fun at Their ‘Age Gap’ After Taking Age Quiz on Date Night
articles.summary:
📰 싱가포르 최신 뉴스
📢 Katy Perry and Justin Trudeau Poke Fun at Their ‘Age Gap’ After Taking Age Quiz ...
articles.content: The couple made their relationship Instagram official in December 2025 after months of public sightings together. Their first official public appearance was in October 2025. Katy Perry and Justin Trudeau are keeping things playful in their relationship. Perry’s result came in at 33.1 years old, more than eight years younger than her actual age. Trudeau’s result read 43, which is about 11 years younger than his real age
